title: Command Cinematic Motion
summary: Added scoped cinematic motion layers to the Command deck: active lane depth, smoother rail pips, and atlas map glide effects without adding scroll height.

expected: Command deck keeps the compact stage layout from the mobile stack pass.
The active detail panel has layered sweep and depth-grid motion.
The active lane rail uses softer pulse and glint motion.
The atlas map has scoped glide and depth-drift overlays.
